response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics perfectly match the Japanese lyrics of '敗北の少年' (Haiboku no Shounen) and 'Luna say maybe' in the Reference JSON. 
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for the lyrics of both songs. Spoken interjections and call-outs ('おらあ！まだまだ行くぞ！' and 'あのね') were transcribed and translated manually as they were missing from the Reference JSON.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously set to synchronize exactly with Kanade's live vocal delivery, utilizing tight sub-second precision to handle rapid delivery without cascading delay issues. Wordless vocalizations were subtitled to capture the full emotional impact of the performance.

subtitles.original: おらあ！まだまだ行くぞ！
subtitles.english: All right! We're still going!

subtitles.original: ぶつかって 逃げ込んで 僕は
subtitles.english: Colliding, running away, I...

subtitles.original: いつしか ここに立ってた
subtitles.english: ...before I knew it, was standing here.

subtitles.original: 誰もが 憧れる ヒーローに
subtitles.english: I wanted to become a hero...

subtitles.original: なりたくて でもなれなくて
subtitles.english: ...that everyone admires, but I couldn't.

subtitles.original: これくらいじゃ 届かないこと
subtitles.english: I knew that like this, I wouldn't reach it,

subtitles.original: 分かっていたのに
subtitles.english: even though I knew that.

subtitles.original: 敗北の少年 現実を謳え
subtitles.english: Defeated boy, sing of reality.

subtitles.original: あんな風に 空は飛べやしないんだ
subtitles.english: You can't fly in the sky like that.

subtitles.original: こんな泥に 意味があるなら
subtitles.english: If there's meaning in this mud,

subtitles.original: 僕らは地を這う
subtitles.english: we will crawl on the ground.

subtitles.original: 耳鳴りか 谺して僕に
subtitles.english: Is it a ringing in my ears echoing to me?

subtitles.original: 奇跡が 問いかけるんだ
subtitles.english: Or is a miracle questioning me?

subtitles.original: 君の夢 憧れたヒーローに
subtitles.english: To the hero your dreams admired,

subtitles.original: 今すぐ させてあげよう
subtitles.english: I will let you become him right now.

subtitles.original: 雨みたいに 差し伸べられたって
subtitles.english: Even if it was reached out to me like rain,

subtitles.original: 嬉しくないんだ
subtitles.english: I wouldn't be happy.

subtitles.original: 敗北の少年 旋風を謳え
subtitles.english: Defeated boy, sing of the whirlwind.

subtitles.original: 君みたいに眩しくはなれないけど
subtitles.english: I can't be radiant like you, but...

subtitles.original: こんな泥に 意味があるなら
subtitles.english: If there's meaning in this mud,

subtitles.original: 僕らは地を這う まだ地を這う
subtitles.english: we will crawl on the ground, still crawl on the ground.

subtitles.original: あぁ...
subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: あぁ...
subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: 鼓動を知って 息を吸い込んで
subtitles.english: Feeling my heartbeat, taking a deep breath,

subtitles.original: 僕は遠慮するよ
subtitles.english: I'll pass.

subtitles.original: 敗北の...
subtitles.english: Defeated...

subtitles.original: 敗北の少年 平凡を謳え
subtitles.english: Defeated boy, sing of the ordinary.

subtitles.original: あいにく神は信じないタチで
subtitles.english: Unfortunately, I'm not the type to believe in God.

subtitles.original: すれ違いの 物語よ サヨナラ
subtitles.english: Goodbye, to our passing story.

subtitles.original: 敗北の少年 現実を謳え
subtitles.english: Defeated boy, sing of reality.

subtitles.original: 僕らは泥を吐き這いつくばるもの
subtitles.english: We are those who spit mud and crawl.

subtitles.original: こんな泥も 愛おしいから
subtitles.english: Because even this mud is beloved,

subtitles.original: 僕らは地を這う ただ地を這う
subtitles.english: we will crawl on the ground, just crawl on the ground.

subtitles.original: あのね
subtitles.english: Hey...

subtitles.original: I say "私、大丈夫?"
subtitles.english: I say, 'Am I okay?'

subtitles.original: Maybe, うまくやれるはず
subtitles.english: Maybe, I should be able to do it well.

subtitles.original: ずっと走った 息継ぎもしないまま
subtitles.english: Running all the way without even taking a breath.

subtitles.original: あっそう、終わりが来るなら
subtitles.english: Oh, if the end is coming,

subtitles.original: 別に寂しくなんかはない
subtitles.english: it's not like I'm lonely or anything.

subtitles.original: 真実は 心の奥の方
subtitles.english: The truth is deep in my heart.

subtitles.original: 自分のことすら 愛せないまま
subtitles.english: Without even being able to love myself...
